overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment at night. The journey begins in a derelict lower area with palm trees, ascends through a plaza with a prominent pink neon sign, and ends in a commercial district with market stalls and vibrant signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict urban lot with abandoned structures

agents.ego_description: walking through a derelict lot past an abandoned car toward a burning fire in the distance

entered.detail: silver sedan parked on the left side of the dirt path
large rusted metal gantry structure spanning across the lot
tall palm trees scattered throughout the derelict area
barrel fire burning brightly in the distance providing warm light
small concrete utility shed on the right side

segments.scene_description: Walking through a derelict urban lot at dusk, passing an abandoned silver sedan on the left. A large metal gantry structure spans overhead while a burning barrel fire illuminates the center path. Palm trees and concrete sheds dot the landscape with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase leading to upper plaza

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete staircase with metal railings

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide concrete staircase with metal railings toward the upper level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
metal handrails flanking both sides of the staircase
tall street lamp illuminating the stairway

segments.scene_description: Ascending a concrete staircase flanked by metal railings, leaving the derelict lot below. Street lamps illuminate the steps while the pink neon sign and stadium structure become visible at the top of the stairs.

events.description: emerges from stairs into open plaza with circular fountain
targets and neutralizes a pedestrian in white shirt near the fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the plaza, observing the fountain and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt standing near the fountain before being targeted

entered.detail: large circular fountain with embedded lighting in the plaza center
massive pink neon lotus flower sign atop a distant skyscraper
large stadium with illuminated rim visible behind the plaza
cluster of futuristic glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a spacious urban plaza featuring a circular fountain with embedded lights. A massive pink neon lotus sign glows atop a distant skyscraper, dominating the skyline. The character encounters a pedestrian near the fountain before continuing to explore the paved area.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza garden area with scattered vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through the grassy areas of the plaza, passing by palm trees and abandoned furniture

entered.detail: grassy areas surrounding the paved fountain plaza
concrete bench abandoned in the grass
large concrete planters containing vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking through the grassy periphery of the plaza, passing abandoned benches and clusters of palm trees. The perspective shifts, placing the pink neon sign to the right while revealing more of the surrounding stadium architecture and concrete planters.

events.description: begins ascending second staircase toward commercial level

agents.ego_description: climbing another set of concrete stairs leading to an upper commercial level

entered.detail: second set of concrete stairs leading to upper commercial district
concrete wall covered in graffiti tags
overhead commercial structure spanning the stairway

segments.scene_description: Ascending a second concrete staircase beneath a commercial overpass. The environment transitions from open plaza to a more enclosed urban corridor with graffiti-covered walls. The pink neon sign remains visible ahead while approaching the commercial level.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial market street with neon signage

events.description: enters commercial district with market stalls and neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking through a commercial street lined with market stalls and vibrant neon signage

entered.detail: illuminated teal neon sign reading WILD BLUE
wooden market stalls and vendor stands lining the street
large geodesic metal dome structure in the distance
large digital billboard displaying advertisements
abandoned cars and trucks parked along the street

segments.scene_description: Entering a vibrant commercial district illuminated by the teal WILD BLUE neon sign and various digital billboards. The street is lined with market stalls and abandoned vehicles, overlooked by a large metal dome structure. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetics and neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a derelict urban lot at dusk into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by passing an abandoned silver sedan and a burning barrel beneath a metal gantry, with distant skyscrapers looming over concrete sheds and palm trees. As the camera ascends a concrete staircase, the desolate lot falls away to reveal a spacious plaza featuring a glowing circular fountain and a massive pink neon lotus sign dominating the skyline. The perspective then drifts through the plaza's grassy periphery and past abandoned benches before climbing a second set of stairs beneath a graffiti-covered overpass. Finally, the environment shifts from the open plaza into a dense urban corridor, emerging into a commercial hub illuminated by teal neon signs, digital billboards, and market stalls beneath a large metal dome.
